headline: Mild Decline / Near Flat Stabilization
marketPulseNote: MILD DECLINE: NEPSE fell 2.61 pts (-0.09%) to 2,757.40 — near flat stabilization after the earlier crash. 82 advanced vs 175 declined. Turnover Rs.6.74B (dramatically lower than crash day Rs.12.38B). B58 slight net buyer (+Rs.6.7M). 3 sub-indices positive (Hotels +1.08%, Hydro +0.15%, Others +0.71%). B58 net buyer in FMDBL, SSHL, HDHPC. Taking profits on crash-day buys NHPC/RIDI/SGHC.
